{{ letter_head }}
{% endif %}
{% set cdc_rows = frappe.db.get_all( "Customer DC child", filters={"parent": doc.customer_dc_id}, fields=["customer_dc_no"], order_by="idx asc", limit=1 ) %} {% set customer_dc_no = cdc_rows[0].customer_dc_no if cdc_rows else "" %} {% set lab_rows = frappe.db.get_all( "Lab inspection", filters={ "parent": doc.lab_inspection_id, "job_card_id": doc.job_card_id }, fields=[ "case_depth_1_1", "case_depth_1_2", "case_depth_1_3", "case_depth_1_4", "case_depth_1_5", "case_depth_1_6", "case_depth_1_7", "case_depth_1_8", "case_depth_1_9", "case_depth_1_10", "hardness_1_1", "hardness_1_2", "hardness_1_3", "hardness_1_4", "hardness_1_5", "hardness_1_6", "hardness_1_7", "hardness_1_8", "hardness_1_9", "hardness_1_10", "other_detail_1", "other_detail_2", "other_detail_3", "other_detail_4", "other_detail_5", "other_detail_6", "other_detail_7", "other_detail_8", "other_detail_9" ], limit=1 ) %} {% set lab_row = lab_rows[0] if lab_rows else none %} {% set has_readings = lab_row and ( lab_row.case_depth_1_1 or lab_row.case_depth_1_2 or lab_row.case_depth_1_3 or lab_row.case_depth_1_4 or lab_row.case_depth_1_5 or lab_row.case_depth_1_6 or lab_row.case_depth_1_7 or lab_row.case_depth_1_8 or lab_row.case_depth_1_9 or lab_row.case_depth_1_10 or lab_row.hardness_1_1 or lab_row.hardness_1_2 or lab_row.hardness_1_3 or lab_row.hardness_1_4 or lab_row.hardness_1_5 or lab_row.hardness_1_6 or lab_row.hardness_1_7 or lab_row.hardness_1_8 or lab_row.hardness_1_9 or lab_row.hardness_1_10 ) %}
TEST CERTIFICATE
No. : {{ doc.name }}
MRN No. : {{ doc.customer_dc_id }}
Your Ref : {{ customer_dc_no }}
Customer Name : {{ doc.customer }}
Material : {{ doc.material }}
Item/Part No. : {{ doc.item }}/{{ doc.part_no }}
Lab Entry No. : {{ doc.lab_inspection_id if lab_row else "" }}
Accepted Qty. : {{ doc.accepted_qty_in_nos }} Nos. {{ doc.accepted_qty_in_kgs }} Kgs.
{% for row in doc.test_parameters_details %} {% endfor %}
Test Parameter Qty Checked Reference Standard Acceptance Criteria Measurement
{{ row.test_parameters }} {{ row.qty_checked }} Nos {{ row.reference_standard }} {{ row.measurement_from }} - {{ row.measurement_to }} {{ row.scale }} {{ row.acceptance_criteria_from }} - {{ row.acceptance_criteria_to }} {{ row.scale }}

CD{{ val }}
